title: canarium balansae
intro: Canarium balansae, also known as the Philippine canarium or balansa tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Canarium balansae include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Canarium balansae is often prepared for herbal use through the extraction of its essential oil, leaves, or seeds, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications.
